text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright believes the light of the Mejiros can
outshine even the most dazzling Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober, as well, hopes to shine that light
on today's stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the strong desires of the other Umamusume
electrifying the air, it seems we're in for a close
contest today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, Mejiro Bright surges forward without
hesitation toward the Arima Kinen to claim it for
the Mejiros.
